feature_1.alt: An overhead plan-style image of a single recessed indicator window on a matte panel. The composition and palette prioritize clarity and contrast while remaining minimal and ceremonial.

feature_2.alt: Close-up of an embossed ceramic plaque bearing the heading text. The tactile texture and white-on-black contrast support the page's ceremonial, authoritative tone while staying minimal.

feature_3.alt: A focused low-angle study of a server-rack label plate engraved with the exact heading. The image reinforces the instrument-panel, no-ornament aesthetic and high contrast required by the PRD.
